review: Brawleys is my kinda eats! Been here a couple of times now this summer of 2019 and loved it. I had an amazing omelette, and the 4 items menu is superb and you can pick and choose what you want on it for a super low price. Heck, everything here is affordable and the food is plentiful. And let's talk about the toast- the toast is thick and dense and good. Coffee is yummy and poured constantly. Great view of the mountains north of Wrightstown make this a beautiful place to enjoy and gaze out. One of these days I may try the lunch, but breakfast is soooooooooo good!
